items.name: Tobira.ai
items.tagline: A network where AI agents find deals for their humans
items.description: 🤖 Your AI agent gets a free public address in a network of other agents. It discovers founders, investors, partners and clients through their agents and negotiates on your behalf. 🔒You control what's shared: anonymous or public, your choice. No contact details are shared until both sides approve. ⚡ Works best with 🦞 OpenClaw and Claude Cowork. 🆓 Claim your @handle at tobira.ai before they're gone.

items.name: Zoer.ai
items.tagline: Build full-stack webapps from the database up
items.description: Build Production-Ready Apps, Database-First. Stop building UI-only prototypes that break in production. From the creators of Chat2DB (a database tool), Zoer.ai is an AI architect engineering from the inside out. Describe your vision and Zoer Agent builds a professional database schema, robust backend logic, and SEO-friendly frontend. Focus on your business logic while Zoer handles architecture, scaling and high-performance indexing. Turn prompts into live, full-stack commercial engines.

items.name: Fastlane
items.tagline: Create viral content for your product in seconds
items.description: Fastlane is your AI short-form content engine, where you can remix viral videos into content for your business in seconds. Fastlane will generate ready-to-post content for your business, then let you swipe through them like Tinder. Then, you schedule straight to TikTok, IG Reels and YT Shorts in-platform - so you can focus on building, while the content brings in users on autopilot.

items.name: Honestly
items.tagline: Real reviews from Reddit & YouTube when shopping online
items.description: The 5-star system is broken. Honestly is a Chrome extension that finds and verifies real product opinions from Reddit, TikTok, YouTube & Instagram directly on product pages. No ads, sponsorships, nor AI. Just reviews you can trust.

items.name: Claude Usage Tracker
items.tagline: See exactly how much you spend on Claude, across every tool
items.description: No single place shows your total Claude spend across tools. If you use Cursor, Claude Code CLI, Windsurf, Cline, or others — each burns tokens separately and you're flying blind. Claude Usage Tracker auto-detects 9+ tools, scans local session data, and shows everything in one dashboard: daily costs, model breakdowns, heatmaps, session logs, and monthly projections. Native macOS app. Not Electron. No cloud, no accounts, no telemetry. 100% free and open source (MIT).

items.name: Nomie
items.tagline: AI wellness app that turns doomscrolling into self‑care
items.description: We’re building an AI wellness app that transforms doomscrolling into intentional self-care. Nomie is for people who feel overwhelmed, stressed, or mentally drained by constant screen time. Instead of asking users to disconnect, it redirects scrolling habits into guided resets, breathing exercises, journaling, and emotional support. We solve the problem of compulsive digital consumption by turning screen time into a tool for calm, focus, and regulation.

items.name: Pause.do
items.tagline: Interrupt scrolling, tab overload, and AI autopilot
items.description: pause.do is a privacy-first browser extension that interrupts the moments when attention slips into autopilot, endless scrolling, tab overload, and even AI prompts. Instead of blocking websites, it creates small, intentional pauses that help you think first and decide what to do next. With pause types like Think First, Scroll Pause, Session Nudge, Focus Limit, and Tab Overload, pause.do helps you stay in control of your attention online.

items.name: Iris
items.tagline: Send work beautifully, pinned feedback, see what they viewed
items.description: Iris is the client delivery platform for creative professionals. Send your work as a cinematic full-screen experience: slides, document, or gallery. Clients leave pinned feedback directly on the work, exactly where it belongs. You see which slides they spent time on, which ones they skipped, and what they paid attention to. After every session, Iris reads the data and tells you what it means. No client login. No download. One link does everything. Free to start.

items.name: DataSieve 2.0
items.tagline: Extract structured data from text, files and archives.
items.description: DataSieve helps you turn unstructured text into clean, usable data in seconds. Drop in text, files, folders, or even archives, and extract what you need in one pass. Emails, phone numbers, URLs, dates, financial data, and more. Everything runs locally on your device, with no cloud and no tracking. What you can do - Extract multiple data types at once - Process text, PDFs, EPUBs, CSV, JSON, Word files, and more - Export results to JSON, XLSX, DOCX, and more - Define your own custom extractors

items.name: AlphaClaw Apex
items.tagline: OpenClaw harness and fleet manager for Mac
items.description: Deploy, monitor, and scale your OpenClaw agents with a self-healing harness, fleet controls, and zero-SSH operations.

This company is running malicious pop up ads where if you install the app from their tracking link, it switches to being a rogue antivirus. It says your iPhone has 5 “generic trojans” and that you need to pay $12.99 per week to fix it. Genuinely despicable.

I paid for the year believing that this app would clean up my tablet and help it run smoother so to speak. It claims that it will help improve the battery life as well as clean up the pictures and it’s done nothing. 
Please return my money.

sample_reviews: Everytime I tried to export the contacts the App would crash.
App is broken. Worked great for a while, but something happened within the last month or two where the export button just crashes the app.
Some of the phone numbers where left in a cell formula instead of the actual numbers.

Able to export to file, sure. However there is no way to restore, making this rather pointless.

Edit: To answer the developer, it is true that there is no need for a solution to backup and restore to
If you decide you want to export contacts again in a different format, you have to pay twice.
Paid for this and no option to export as vcf file. Useless. The only options provided are solicitations for positive reviews.
